name: Spaghetti Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb ground beef, or ground turkey
1 can Pasta Ready Tomatoes, Garlic & Herb flavor (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook and drain spaghetti (3 1/4 cups cooked).
2. Stir butter, parmesan cheese, and eggs into hot spaghetti.
3. Form mixture into a crust in a buttered 10-inch pie plate.
4. Cook beef and onion until meat is browned; drain fat.
5. Stir tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, oregano, and garlic; heat.
6. Mix cottage cheese, egg, bread crumbs, spinach, and half of the mozzarella cheese in a separate bowl.
7. Spread mixture over spaghetti.
8. Top pie with tomato mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
10. Top with remaining mozzarella and bake for an additional 10 minutes (or until cheese is melted and bubbly).
